name: Hansi Parrot Wood Stand Activity Center Ladder w/Cup Natural Stand with 5cm Cups
description: Description:Comfortable for birds to stand on, let your birds stand and rest, relieves boredom and increases activity fun.Great place to play and exercise, encourage birds to exercise and help them develop balance and coordination ability.A funny and colorful activity toy for your pet, can be placed on the desktop or balcony for parrot play or interact with the owner.Comes with cups, can place food and drink respectively.Easy to install and use, sturdy and durable.Specification:Material: Wood+Stainless SteelSize(LxH): approx. 41x23cm/ 16.14x9inchCup diameter: 5cm/ 1.96inch, 6.5cm/ 2.56inch, 7.
